steps.t: Prince Ingór asked you to collect some picks and shovels from inside Zarkul-sulûn and deliver them to some of the Zhélruka standing idle within the fo…
Idle Zhélruka can be found throughout the fortress of Zarkul-sulûn, waiting for you to give them picks and shovels to use to break through the ice in …
Prince Ingór is waiting to hear that his people have been given the supplies needed to break through the ice blocking the entrance to Gundabad.
Durin is eager to gain access to Gundabad, and believes that the ice will not long stand before the combined efforts of his Longbeards and Prince Ingó…
Durin is at Maergrind, the Noble Gate, inside the mighty court of Máttugard.
